schema: OPH A5 screen/SM closure certificate v1

generation_bridge.theorem: A nontrivial face-C3 phase extended to a dimension-minimal irreducible linear A5 carrier forces dimension 3 (3 or 3').

compact_lie_trichotomy.reason: the only compact semisimple dimension-11 type is A2+A1
the only compact semisimple dimension-6 type is A1+A1

coefficient_rank5_noncentral_corollary.theorem: For a group-level A5 action on the compact coefficient algebra, noncentrality of its W5 summand selects su(3)+su(2)+u(1).
coefficient_rank5_noncentral_corollary.proof_summary: the other two viable compact outcomes place the W5 coefficient summand in the center
coefficient_rank5_noncentral_corollary.physical_gate: A5-COMMON-ACTION plus a source-derived W5 current commutator; PORT-CURRENT-INNER is the stronger route

higgs_missing_four_audit.reason: the real A5 irrep 4 has End_A5(4)=R, so no A5-invariant complex structure exists for a commuting U(1) hypercharge action

theorem_scope.exact_here: conditional finite A5 vertex module and compact coefficient-algebra classification
exact_companion_constructions: six-axis lattice quotient isomorphic to Z6

BLOCK-DETERMINANT-BALANCE, PORT-SPIN-LIFT, and AXIS-CENTER-DESCENT identify the physical group and quotient
